package rulecoverage

func NegativeDefaultValueInjectionScatteredAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "default_value_injection_scattered_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated defaulting logic for pagination, filters, or booleans across handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
